name: Lossless OpenClaw Orchestrator
description: Collaborate with local Codex sessions through OpenClaw using local indexing, prepared-state recall, bounded expansion, and approval-gated dry-run/control boundaries.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_index_sessions
toolDeclarations.description: Index local Codex session JSONL files into the local orchestrator database.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_search_sessions
toolDeclarations.description: Search indexed Codex sessions with bounded safe text.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_grep
toolDeclarations.description: Search Codex index and optional read-only OpenClaw LCM peer DBs with source-prefixed refs.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_describe_session
toolDeclarations.description: Describe one indexed Codex session by thread id.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_describe_ref
toolDeclarations.description: Describe a source-prefixed recall ref such as codex_thread:* or lcm_summary:*.

metadata.operatorPathRole: Look up a specific session or source ref after the inbox identifies it.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_expand_session
toolDeclarations.description: Expand one indexed Codex session into a bounded evidence brief.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_expand_query
toolDeclarations.description: Search then expand the best matching Codex or LCM peer recall ref.

metadata.operatorPathRole: Expand one bounded evidence brief from a query when the ref is not known.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_summary_leaves
toolDeclarations.description: List deterministic public-safe summary leaves over prepared Codex source ranges.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_summary_expand
toolDeclarations.description: Expand public-safe summary leaf lineage under depth, node, and token caps.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_prepared_state_status
toolDeclarations.description: Read public-safe prepared-state cache coverage and counts.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_prepared_cards
toolDeclarations.description: List public-safe prepared Codex state cards over summary leaves.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_prepared_inbox
toolDeclarations.description: Read the deterministic execute-false prepared-state attention inbox.

metadata.operatorPathRole: Start from the compact prepared-state operating picture.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_codex_thread_map
toolDeclarations.description: Read the indexed Codex thread map.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_codex_session_management_map
toolDeclarations.description: Read a public-safe orchestration map for active, blocked, expansion, archive, fork, and resume lanes.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_recent_sessions
toolDeclarations.description: List recent or active Codex sessions as compact public-safe cards without requiring query text.

metadata.operatorPathRole: Refresh recent or active session cards after reads or approved actions.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_cockpit_inbox
toolDeclarations.description: Rank Codex sessions that need attention using deterministic public-safe session cards.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_codex_collaboration_cockpit
toolDeclarations.description: Summarize Codex collaboration lanes from indexed sessions, inbox urgency, watcher requests, and optional Desktop coherence/fallback evidence without performing actions.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_codex_collaboration_next_steps
toolDeclarations.description: Plan exact read-only next tool calls for Codex collaboration lanes without executing control or GUI actions.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_codex_runtime_desktop_visibility_status
toolDeclarations.description: Summarize whether collaboration cockpit lanes have public-safe runtime Desktop visibility proof or exact read-only next proof steps.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_codex_active_thread_state
toolDeclarations.description: Classify active Codex threads using public-safe cockpit signals, attention coverage, execute-false read-only probes, and non-executed control dry-run recommendations where safe.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_codex_autonomy_tick
toolDeclarations.description: Plan one deterministic read-only Codex autonomy loop tick from active-thread state without executing control, GUI actions, raw transcript reads, publishing, or releases.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_codex_desktop_collaboration_proof
toolDeclarations.description: Validate an exact action-bound Codex Desktop collaboration proof packet without running live control or GUI mutation.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_watchers_list
toolDeclarations.description: List read-only watcher specs as deterministic public-safe watcher status rows.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_watcher_status
toolDeclarations.description: Describe one read-only watcher status without cleanup or mutation.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_watcher_dry_run
toolDeclarations.description: Preview watcher-triggered resume request packets without sending or mutating anything.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_watcher_events
toolDeclarations.description: Read persisted public-safe watcher observations and execute-false local attention queue items.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_resume_request_packet
toolDeclarations.description: Create one approval-bounded resume request packet from a read-only watcher spec.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_codex_app_server_status
toolDeclarations.description: Read Codex app-server status and read-method posture without enabling control.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_codex_app_server_threads
toolDeclarations.description: Read Codex app-server thread metadata and loaded-signal posture without turns or raw paths.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_codex_start_thread_post_create_proof
toolDeclarations.description: Read public-safe post-create proof for a newly started Codex thread without control, raw transcripts, or GUI mutation.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_visible_codex_map
toolDeclarations.description: Join indexed session cards with optional visible Codex and read-only app-server signals.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_codex_desktop_coherence
toolDeclarations.description: Classify whether CLI/direct/app-server Codex thread evidence is also visible in Codex Desktop without performing control or GUI actions.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_codex_desktop_fallback_status
toolDeclarations.description: Report CUA-first and Peekaboo-secondary Codex Desktop fallback readiness for a target thread without performing GUI actions.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_plan_state_pins
toolDeclarations.description: Extract only manual pins, approval boundaries, and exception ledger entries from PLAN_STATE text.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_github_operating_items
toolDeclarations.description: Normalize public-safe GitHub issue, PR, and check records into Eva operating-picture github_items without writing to GitHub.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_project_digest
toolDeclarations.description: Create a read-only Eva operating digest from LCO/Codex cards, optional structured GitHub items, PLAN_STATE pins, and source authority coverage.

metadata.operatorPathRole: Create a bounded provenance and handoff digest from available operating inputs.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_attention_inbox
toolDeclarations.description: Return only operating-picture cards that need action, review, approval, watch, or blocker triage.

metadata.operatorPathRole: Review the compact attention queue before choosing a next action.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_business_pulse
toolDeclarations.description: Answer 'How is the business?' from bounded cited operating cards with explicit source and authority coverage gaps.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_codex_final_messages
toolDeclarations.description: Read final assistant/status messages extracted from Codex sessions.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_codex_plans
toolDeclarations.description: Read proposed_plan blocks extracted from Codex sessions.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_codex_touched_files
toolDeclarations.description: Read touched files extracted for one Codex session.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_codex_tool_calls
toolDeclarations.description: Read redacted tool-call metadata extracted from Codex sessions.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_closeout_dry_run
toolDeclarations.description: Preview public-safe closeout envelopes that a hook-agent could attach without mutating Codex.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_session_sanitizer
toolDeclarations.description: Dry-run public-safe sanitizer findings from indexed Codex safe text without reading raw transcripts or mutating sessions.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_codex_sqlite_stores
toolDeclarations.description: Probe local Codex state_*.sqlite and logs_*.sqlite stores read-only.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_lcm_peer_dbs
toolDeclarations.description: Probe configured OpenClaw LCM peer DBs read-only.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_codex_control_dry_run
toolDeclarations.description: Create a dry-run audit id for a Codex control action.

metadata.operatorPathRole: Create the exact dry-run action packet and approval hashes before live control.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_codex_start_thread
toolDeclarations.description: Create a new Codex thread. Dry-run by default; live mode requires approval_audit_id and still needs follow-up proof before durability claims.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_codex_resume_thread
toolDeclarations.description: Resume or rejoin a Codex thread. Live mode requires approval_audit_id.

metadata.operatorPathRole: Run the approved resume action only after a matching dry-run audit id.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_codex_send_message
toolDeclarations.description: Send a message to a Codex thread. Live mode requires approval_audit_id.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_codex_steer_thread
toolDeclarations.description: Steer a running Codex thread. Live mode requires approval_audit_id and expected_turn_id.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_codex_interrupt_thread
toolDeclarations.description: Interrupt a Codex thread. Live mode requires approval_audit_id.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_desktop_see
toolDeclarations.description: Inspect desktop fallback readiness through direct/CUA/Peekaboo backends.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_desktop_act
toolDeclarations.description: Dry-run desktop fallback action for CUA/Peekaboo; live requests return structured missing-proof blockers.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_desktop_proof_report
toolDeclarations.description: Validate a supplied public-safe desktop GUI action observation and return release-compatible proof when it satisfies no-focus/action-bound gates.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_desktop_live_proof_harness
toolDeclarations.description: Prepare a public-safe desktop live/no-focus proof packet without running the GUI action.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_desktop_proof_action
toolDeclarations.description: Run the one approved CUA TextEdit scratch launch proof action and return a public-safe observation for proof-report validation.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_doctor
toolDeclarations.description: Read local orchestrator health.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_permissions
toolDeclarations.description: Read safety posture for live controls.

toolDeclarations.name: loo_audit_tail
toolDeclarations.description: Read recent local audit records without raw prompt text.

toolDeclarations.name: lco_describe_ref
toolDeclarations.description: Describe a source-prefixed recall ref such as codex_thread:* or lcm_summary:*.

metadata.operatorPathRole: Look up a specific session or source ref after the inbox identifies it.

toolDeclarations.name: lco_expand_query
toolDeclarations.description: Search then expand the best matching Codex or LCM peer recall ref.

metadata.operatorPathRole: Expand one bounded evidence brief from a query when the ref is not known.

toolDeclarations.name: lco_prepared_inbox
toolDeclarations.description: Read the deterministic execute-false prepared-state attention inbox.

metadata.operatorPathRole: Start from the compact prepared-state operating picture.

toolDeclarations.name: lco_recent_sessions
toolDeclarations.description: List recent or active Codex sessions as compact public-safe cards without requiring query text.

metadata.operatorPathRole: Refresh recent or active session cards after reads or approved actions.

toolDeclarations.name: lco_project_digest
toolDeclarations.description: Create a read-only Eva operating digest from LCO/Codex cards, optional structured GitHub items, PLAN_STATE pins, and source authority coverage.

metadata.operatorPathRole: Create a bounded provenance and handoff digest from available operating inputs.

toolDeclarations.name: lco_attention_inbox
toolDeclarations.description: Return only operating-picture cards that need action, review, approval, watch, or blocker triage.

metadata.operatorPathRole: Review the compact attention queue before choosing a next action.

toolDeclarations.name: lco_codex_control_dry_run
toolDeclarations.description: Create a dry-run audit id for a Codex control action.

metadata.operatorPathRole: Create the exact dry-run action packet and approval hashes before live control.

toolDeclarations.name: lco_codex_resume_thread
toolDeclarations.description: Resume or rejoin a Codex thread. Live mode requires approval_audit_id.

metadata.operatorPathRole: Run the approved resume action only after a matching dry-run audit id.

namingPolicy.aliasPolicy: `lco_*` is the forward public alias target for new user-facing tool names. Public-facade tools expose tested `lco_*` aliases while historical `loo_*` names stay backward compatible. Alias declarations point at their `loo_*` target with `metadata.aliasOf` and do not create separate coverage obligations.

desktopFallback.missingPreferredBackendBehavior: normal read/search/describe workflows continue; desktop fallback readiness reports an actionable CUA blocker
desktopFallback.proofBoundary: CUA fallback readiness reports daemon and blocker state; MCP launchability still requires an explicit `cua-driver mcp --help` check unless LCO adds a launch probe. Codex composer-write proof needs a separately documented read-back before any send claim, and the current LCO proof report/live-proof harness do not validate a composer read-back field. No generic GUI mutation, unattended control, no-focus behavior, composer send approval, or release readiness is claimed without action-bound proof.

facade.description: Expose only public-facade tools and their lco_* aliases.

standard.description: Expose public-facade and workflow-detail tools, plus public-facade lco_* aliases.

all.description: Expose the full LCO catalog, plus public-facade lco_* aliases.

exposureProfile.callPolicy: LOO_TOOL_PROFILE filters tools/list and OpenClaw declarations only; hidden tools remain callable by exact name when invoked by a capable client.

toolSurface.proofBoundary: This metadata defines recommended operator tiers only. It does not remove tools, hide expert/debug surfaces, loosen approvals, run live Codex control, mutate a GUI, publish npm, or create GitHub releases.
